summary: WoWMeta M+ 26-spec re-rank ingested (8 consensus, 0 two-band; likely M+ reset). Other tiers/metrics 0. WCL rdps-broken:5 unreach,3 raw. Surv tank empty. No build; 1 vid queued.

sources.detail: All 6 pages (raid+M+, all roles) re-fetched live via curl; parsed table.tier-list rows (tier <td>, incl the A+ tier, + tier-list-entry img alt). Era-verified Midnight Season 1 / 12.0.7 / Devourer. 80 assignments (40 raid + 40 M+), 0 unmatched, 0 tier moves vs stored (2nd run same day; upstream unchanged since ~11:41Z). Snapshots 07-19.

Both pages re-fetched live; parsed tier__title S/A/B/C blocks + tier__icon img alt. Era-verified (Devourer present). Raid 39 (Vengeance DH still omitted upstream - absence, not error), M+ 40 = 79 rows, 0 unmatched, 0 moves vs stored. M+ dungeon-filter icons correctly rejected. Snapshots 07-19.

Sanctioned r.jina.ai path 403-blocked from the runner all run; raw-HTML fallback with full browser headers succeeded (earlier 919b Cloudflare block was transient). Parsed the embedded WH.markup [li]{Spec} ({Tier} Tier) ranking lists (color-tag stripped; tolerated one malformed 'Subtlety Rogue B Tier)' missing its open-paren, grouped in B). Era-verified Midnight Season 1 / 12.0.7. 80 rows (40+40), 0 unmatched, 0 moves vs stored. Snapshots 07-19.

All 6 raid(throughput)/M+(score) pages re-parsed from __NEXT_DATA__ specTierListSection.tierLists; 80 rows, 0 unmatched, 0 tier moves vs stored (upstream daily noon refresh, none since the earlier 07-19 run). Snapshots 07-19.

Full re-fetch of all 9 raid bosses (throughput) + 8 M+ dungeons (score) across all 3 roles (51 pages); every encounter parsed 40/40 specs from __NEXT_DATA__. 680 cells, 0 unmatched, 0 changed vs stored (upstream unchanged since the earlier 07-19 run). encounter-tiers.json asOf 07-19, left byte-identical.

Survivability tierList re-parsed from the 3 raid pages: DPS (27) + healer (7) merged = 34 rows, 0 tier moves vs stored. The TANK raid page's survivability tierList is EMPTY upstream this run (tiers: []) - the 6 tank survivability tiers could not be refreshed and are left unchanged at their 07-19 values (still 40/40 specs stored via upsert). asOf 07-19.

Sanctioned r.jina.ai path 403-blocked all run; raw-HTML fetch succeeded and returned a full server-rendered tier table (WoWMeta now SSRs it - no client fetch() for tier data, no hydration-placeholder divergence). Era-verified 'MN 12.0.7 / Mythic+ Season 1' (NO season flip; the 12.1 substrings are SVG path coords). Parsed the ranked <table> only (bounded to avoid the duplicate all-specs section): 40/40 specs, 0 unmatched. 26 spec tier moves vs stored (e.g. Aug B->S, BM Hunter S->B) - a genuine data-driven re-rank, likely M+ weekly-reset volatility (Mythicstats period 1072 mid-reset). Ingested; diluted to 8 blended-consensus band moves, 0 of >=2 bands (well within the 25/6 anomaly limits). Snapshots 07-19.

Per the pre-agent deterministic WCL fetch step (wcl-fetch/evidence.json, verdict rdps-broken, attemptedAt 2026-07-19T18:29Z): characterRankings(metric: rdps) returns a bare Internal server error on encounter 3176 - the redistributed-credit metric family is still broken upstream. Agent holds no WCL credentials and did not fetch warcraftlogs.com. Zone 46 Mythic medians unchanged at the 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence.json rdps-broken); no zone 47 M+ cut can honestly land. Data unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.

Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence.json rdps-broken); zone 54 (all 3 role cuts) cannot land. 12.1 PTR raid-testing normalized scores unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline (coverage 07-09, 40 rows).
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence.json rdps-broken); zone 56 (DPS/tank/healer) cannot land. 12.1 PTR M+ testing rDPS/HPS metrics unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence.json rdps-broken); zone 52 Dummy Dome aggregate=amount median rDPS cannot land. spec.ptrDummy unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.

The deterministic src/fetch-wcl.mjs step (frozen recipe) paginated each DPS dummy metric:dps leaderboard and merged 103 per-spec raw-DPS medians before the agent started (evidence.landed wcl-dummy-raw = 103 rows; players 1T:2000 2T:175 3T:122 5T:1677). Agent did not re-fetch or edit these rows; asOf 2026-07-19.

The deterministic fetch step pooled zone-54 Heroic best-parse raw-DPS across 8 bosses (6 populated: Nek'zali 370, Sentinels 363, Vashnik 678, Lost Explorers 150, Sszorak 184, Twin Fangs 146; Coiled Altar and Ula'tek 0 = untested windows) and merged 27 rows (evidence.landed = 27). Agent did not re-fetch or edit; asOf 2026-07-19.

The deterministic fetch step pooled zone-56 S2 PTR key raw-DPS across all 8 dungeons (players 779-2000 each) and merged 27 rows (evidence.landed = 27). Agent did not re-fetch or edit; asOf 2026-07-19.

40/40 rows (27 DPS + 7 healer + 6 tank) re-fetched live via plain GET; parsed the top-50 avg M+ rating ceiling by meta-item card (href-boundary slicing so the twice-'meta-item' Devourer/Outlaw cards parse), range 3738-4288. Era-verified Midnight Season 1. 0 value changes vs stored. asOf 07-19.

26/26 non-Augmentation DPS fight profiles re-fetched via talent_target_scaling/castingpatchwerk; MID1 confirmed on every chart; best-build DPS at counts 1/2/3/5/8/15. Augmentation absent by design. 0 target changes vs stored. asOf 07-19.

Nightly MID1_Raid report (.html, 37MB) re-fetched: only WoW build string is 12.0.7.68453 Live (the 622 '12.1' hits are numeric noise - medians/percents/times - not a season flip). 26/26 DPS parsed as best variant per spec from player-section headers; 0 changes vs stored (same nightly report as the earlier 07-19 run). Augmentation excluded by design. asOf 07-19.

Period 1072 (ongoing reset) re-fetched live from raw server-rendered HTML (r.jina.ai not needed - the representation bar chart is now SSR'd with img alt + span.mt-1 percentage). Era-verified MN 12.0.7, no season flip. Representation = 39 specs (Resto Druid absent = negligible top-2000 presence, kept at stored value), 0 value changes vs stored. 40 rows total. asOf 07-19.

Forum thread (Discourse .json) + Wowhead news RSS both checked live. Thread tops at post #15 (Linxy Rogue Outlaw addendum, 07-14 22:46Z) under already-logged build #14 - NO new development-notes build. RSS newest 12.1 items (07-19 Temple of Sethraliss M+ S2 first-look + housing decor; 07-18 Delve boss preview + PvP tuning) are none a new class development-notes build nor a per-spec review with a clear verdict (Holy Pally 07-16 review already covered by the existing Clarius writeup). ptr-builds.json unchanged; no writeups fabricated. zone-54/52/56 evidence-only (rdps-broken).

All 25 unique creator RSS feeds polled live (25/25 OK). Transcript queue was empty at fetch time (summary.json requested:0 fetched:0 verdict:ok) - nothing to distill; creator-takes.json unchanged. 1 new in-scope video queued pending: Supatease sZwBwfkcuZ0 'The Tides of The Meta Are Shifting' (07-19; scoped Sham/Lock/Warr theorycrafter, plausible S2 meta read). Triaged out: DalaranGaming Monk/Evoker 'Early PTR Preview' patch-note readthroughs (no Monk/Evoker scope), and various PvP/stream/gameplay vids. izen newest still 5wntDvx3wmo (already latest). Pending queue 0 to 1.
